menu.welcome:
*👋 Welcome, {{firstName}}!*

I am FilmFounder, a bot for finding movies.
Just click the button below and I will help you find a movie by its description.

session.startPrompt:
📝 *I'm listening!*

Describe everything you remember about the movie. I'll do my best to find it.

_You have 3 attempts per session._
session.sessionExists:
*You already have an active session.*
Please end it or wait 10 minutes before starting a new one.
session.sessionStoped:
✅ *Search completed.*
I hope I was able to help! You can now start a new session.
session.sessionStopedByTimer:
⏱ *Session ended due to inactivity.*
You can start a new one anytime.
session.limitDayReached:
🛑 *Daily limit reached.*
You've used your 2 sessions for today. Come back tomorrow!
session.limitReached:
⚠️ *Attempts exhausted.*
I can't answer anymore in this session. Please end it and start a new one.
